docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOYANICH, JACOB AS TO DEFENDANT MCKEEMAN, DARREN
ORDER CASE CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUEMENTS FOR DETAILS.)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,800.00 FILED BY BOYANICH, JACOB AS TO DEFENDANT MCKEEMAN, DARREN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-03-2021 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $40) SERVED SEP-27-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MCKEEMAN, DARREN

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-03-2021 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO NOV-24-2021 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JACOB BOYANICH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DARREN MCKEEMAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS UNFAMILIAR WITH PLAINTIFF'S IDENTITY DUE TO LEGAL NAME CHANGE. AND REQUEST A CONTINUANCE SO HE CAN PROPERLY DEFEND HIMSELF IN THIS MATTER. COURT ALLOWS DEFENDANTS REQUEST.PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A DATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-14-2021, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MCKEEMAN, DARREN

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-24-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-14-2022 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT.506. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $990.00 (COSTS INCLUDED) TO THE PLAINTIFF. PAYMENT TO BE MADE BY CASHIER'S CHECK ON OR ABOUT DECEMBER 15, 2021 AND MAILED OUT. FAILURE TO DO SO BEFORE THE COURT DATE AN ADDITIONAL $200.00 WILL BE ADDED FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE JANUARY 14, 2022 HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PLAINTIFF JACOB BOYANICH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DARREN MCKEEMAN IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER CONTINUED TO JAN-14-2022 FOR PROGRESS REPORT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
